reference: Hi, I had an intrauterine insemination that failed. It is now the sixth day of my cycle and I am experiencing horrible lower abdominal and back pain. I used Ovidrel to help stimulate ovulation and progesterone suppositories up until my negative pregnancy test. Is this pain normal and how long will it last?
text: Hi. I had an intrauterine insemination that failed. It is now the sixth day of my cycle and I am experiencing horrible lower abdominal and back pain. I used Ovidryl to help stimulate ovulation and progesterone suppositories up until my negative pregnancy test. Is this pain normal and how long will it last?
